titleStmt.title: SII 17.539: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 539. (A.R. No. 497 of 1904). VĒDĀRAṆYAM, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the first prākāra in the Vēdāraṇyēśvara temple.
The details of date viz., Makara ba. 6, Friday, Chittirai corresponds to 1272 A.D. January 22, Friday, f.d.t., ·18: ·90.

This records the gift of 3/4 vēli of land made tax-free by the ūravar of Śiṟumuttarai and Pāṟpunaṅkiḻaiyāṉ Karikālaśōḻa-ppallavaraiyaṉ, for food offerings to the deities Āḷuḍaiyār and Nāyakar and their Nāchchiyārs, whose images were set up by Āṇḍanāyakaṉ alias Piramīśvaramuḍaiyār, the headman of Karaikkaḍaippu Eḻumūr in the western division of Umbaḷa-nāḍu in the temple of Iḷamaṟaikkāḍuḍaiya Nāyaṉār.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī rājendracoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu [2 10 6] vatu makaranāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu ṣaṣṭiyum veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum cittiraiyumāṉa nāḷ rā[ja*]rā[ja*]ppāṇṭi nāṭṭu maturotaiya vaḷanāṭṭu ṟṟūr nāṭṭu pāṟpuṉaṅ kiḻaiyān Araiyaṉ ṉmu yaṉāṉa karikālacoḻappallavaraiyaṉum Ivva vāḻnāṭṭu ciṟumut
tarai Ūravarum Iṟaiili pramāṇa Icaivu tiṭṭu Ivvūril Uṭaiyār Iḷamaṟaikkāṭuṭaiya nāya(nāya)ṉār koyil Āticaṇṭeśvaratevarkaṉmi koyil kaṇakkaṉukku Innāṭṭu melai vakaiyil karaikkaṭaippu Eḻumur kiḻavaṉ Āṇṭanāyakaṉāna piramiśvaramuṭaiyār Ikkoyilil Eḻuntaruḷuvitta Āḷuṭaiyārkkum nācciyārkkum nāya
karkkum nācciyārkkum Amutupaṭikku Eṅkaḷ Ūril Iṟai Iṟukka nāṅkaḷ Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭutta maṟaiññāṉavāyil cūṟimu ḻai nilattukku kiḻpāṟkellai kiḻpāḻi nāṭṭu veḷār kaḷar nilattukku meṟkkum teṉpāṟkellai Iṉnāyaṉār Ūrkkiḻ Iṟaiyili nilattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai pirāmaṉ vāykkālukku kiḻa
kku vaṭapāṟkellai Erikku teṟkum naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa kuḻi1000- ṉāl nilam ṟā Innilam Araiyum Iṅku viṭṭu vaṭakku Eriyil nirttiṭal ceyta nilattukku kiḻpāṟkellai kulot tuṅkacoḻa Umpaḷanāṭṭukkoṉ payirceykiṟa nilattukku teṟkum Āka Icainta Innāṉkellaikku naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam ku 100- ṉāl nilam va Innilam kālum Āka nilamḷu Innila
mukkālum Innāḷ mutal cantirātittavaraiyum Iṟaiyiliyāka Aṉupavikkavum Iṉnilattukku Ūrile Eṟṟi Iṟukka kaṭavomākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu Iṟaiyili pramāṇa Icaivu tiṭṭu kuṭuttom Uṭaiyār Iḷamaṟaikkāṭṭuṭaiyār koyil tevar kanmi koyil kaṇakkaṉukku(ṉukku) pāṟpuṉaṅkiḻaiyāṉ karikālacoḻap pallavaraiya ṉum Āḻkarai Ūravarum Ivva
ṉaivom Ippaṭikku Ivai pāṟpuṉaṅkiḻāṉ Arumoḻitevaṉ karikālacoḻa palla varaiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kulottuṅkacoḻa Umpaḷanāṭṭukkon Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai paraṉpaḷḷi Uṭaiyān tamiḻataraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai ciṟu vāymukamuṭaiyāṉ caññaiyāṉamaikku kiḻmuḻaiyilāṉ rācarāca caruppetimaṅkalattu niṉṟaiyil ciraṅkapaṭṭan Eḻuttu
ippaṭikku Ivai Ivvūrk kaṇakku tūṇūruṭaiyān nāraāyaṇa tevaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven kuṉṟūr nāṭṭu kaṇakku kuṉṟūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 17.539 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
